content:
University of Limpopo 2027 Application Dates

Planning to study at the University of Limpopo (UL/Turfloop) in 2027? This guide covers the exact application opening and closing dates, how to apply online, and what you need to prepare. Don't miss the deadline — late applications are rarely accepted.

Key 2027 Application Dates for University of Limpopo

EventDate (Approximate)
2027 Applications OpenApril 1, 2026
2027 Application Closing DateSeptember 30, 2026
Results NotificationNovember–December 2026
Academic Year StartsJanuary/February 2027
Registration PeriodJanuary 2027

Note: Dates are approximate and subject to change. Always verify the exact dates on the official University of Limpopo website at www.ul.ac.za.

University of Limpopo 2027 Application Opening Date

The University of Limpopo typically opens applications for the following year on April 1. For 2027 intake, this means applications open on April 1, 2026.

We strongly recommend applying as soon as applications open — especially for competitive programmes like Medicine, Health Sciences, and Law. First-come, first-served principles may apply for limited-space programmes.

University of Limpopo 2027 Application Closing Date

The University of Limpopo's application closing date for 2027 intake is expected to be around September 30, 2026. This is consistent with most South African universities' September deadline.

Some high-demand programmes (such as Medicine and Health Sciences) may close earlier. Check the UL website for programme-specific deadlines.

University of Limpopo APS Requirements 2026/2027

FacultyMinimum APSKey Subject Requirements
Health Sciences (Medicine — Sefako Makgatho)30+Mathematics 4+, Physical Sciences 4+, Life Sciences 4+, English 4+
Health Sciences (Nursing, Pharmacy)24–28Life Sciences 4+, English 4+, Mathematics 3+
Law (LLB)24English 4+, any five subjects
Management and Law (BCom)22Mathematics 3+, English 4+
Humanities (BA)20English 3+, any other five subjects
Education (BEd)22English 4+, subject specialisation varies
Science and Agriculture22Mathematics 4+, Physical Sciences or Life Sciences 4+, English 3+

Note: UL uses the standard 7-point APS scale. Life Orientation is counted at half value (maximum 2 APS points).

How to Apply to University of Limpopo Online

  1. Visit: www.ul.ac.za
  2. Select: "Apply Online" from the Admissions menu
  3. Register for an applicant account if you don't have one
  4. Complete the online application form with your personal details, NSC results, and programme choice
  5. Upload certified copies of your ID and academic results
  6. Pay the application fee: approximately R200 (check current fee on UL website)
  7. Submit your application and save your reference number

Documents Needed for UL Application

  • Certified copy of your South African ID or passport
  • Certified copy of your Grade 11 final results (if applying before matric)
  • Certified copy of your NSC / matric certificate (once available)
  • Proof of residence
  • Application fee payment confirmation

NSFAS at University of Limpopo

The University of Limpopo is a NSFAS-accredited institution. Students from households with income below R350,000/year can apply for NSFAS at www.nsfas.org.za. NSFAS applications open in October each year and close approximately in December.

Tips for Your University of Limpopo Application

  • Apply early: Don't wait until September — apply as soon as the portal opens in April
  • Double-check your APS: Use our free APS Calculator to confirm you meet the minimum
  • Apply to multiple programmes: You can list up to 3 programme choices in order of preference
  • Keep records: Save your application reference number and all correspondence from UL

Need help improving your Grade 12 marks to meet UL's APS requirements? StudyBuddy's AI tutor helps Grade 10–12 students improve across all subjects. Start free today.

quickAnswer: University of Limpopo 2027 applications open approximately April 1, 2026 and close around September 30, 2026. Apply online at www.ul.ac.za. Application fee is approximately R200. NSFAS funding is available for qualifying students.

faqs.question: When do University of Limpopo 2027 applications open?
faqs.answer: University of Limpopo 2027 applications typically open on April 1, 2026. We recommend applying as soon as the portal opens, especially for competitive programmes like Medicine, Pharmacy, and Law. Visit www.ul.ac.za to apply online.

faqs.question: When do University of Limpopo applications close in 2026?
faqs.answer: The University of Limpopo application closing date for 2027 intake is expected around September 30, 2026. Some competitive programmes may close earlier. Always verify exact dates at www.ul.ac.za.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for University of Limpopo?
faqs.answer: The University of Limpopo application fee is approximately R200. This fee is non-refundable. Some applicants who cannot afford the fee may qualify for a fee waiver — contact the admissions office for details.

faqs.question: Can I apply to University of Limpopo with my Grade 11 results?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can apply to the University of Limpopo using your Grade 11 final results (which are available in January). If you are offered a place, it will be conditional on your final Grade 12 (NSC) results meeting the requirements.
